pi_items.source: Verified by checking export_result.sh and verifier.py which both look for this explicit path.
Verified via verifier.py logic where expected_title defaults to this exact string.
Verified via verifier.py logic where expected_manager defaults to this exact string.
Verified via verifier.py logic where expected_company defaults to this exact string.
Verified via verifier.py which expects at least this many tasks as an anti-gaming check. A grep of the source assets/sample_project.xml shows 146 <Task> elements.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a standard 'Commercial Construction' sample project loaded into the ProjectLibre environment. The verifier.py script and export_result.sh explicitly verify that the updated project is saved to '/home/ga/Projects/compliant_project.xml'. The verifier directly parses the output XML for the expected target metadata: Title ('Enterprise Software Rev B'), Manager ('Sarah Connor'), and Company ('Cyberdyne Systems'), matching the instructions. Finally, it enforces an anti-gaming check requiring a minimum of 10 tasks to ensure the original project structure was preserved, which is valid since the original file contains 146 tasks.
